title: Silky Argentinian Beef Stir-fry
description: This low-carb-friendly meal-prep argentinian dish features fresh, silky beef with a touch of rosemary for added depth and flavor. Perfect for quick weeknight dinners.

ingredients.name: Rice
ingredients.notes: Use for serving if desired, optional

ingredients.name: Rosemary sprigs
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely, adds depth of flavor

instructions: Prepare the beef strips by slicing them into thin, even pieces.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg whites and black pepper. Set aside.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and garlic to the skillet. Sauté for about 2 minutes until softened.
Fold in the seasoned beef strips and cook for another 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Sprinkle rosemary leaves evenly over the top of the beef. Pour the egg white mixture into the skillet.
Cook until the sauce thickens slightly and coats the beef evenly, about 2-3 more minutes.
Serve hot with cooked rice if desired.
